must_detect.matched_text:
Data Processing Addendum Schedule (PRC PIPL/CSL/DSL) for Jasper Crane Microdrives (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd., USCC: FIC-92M0-AB12-3456-789X; DPO: Ms. Qiu Lanying, dpo@jaspercrane.cn, Tel +86-400-123-7788.
Scope covers HR onboarding and issuer support for pre-listing disclosures under PRC Securities Law; categories include employee identifiers (PRC Resident ID placeholder RCN-4403-1988-XXXX), contact, payroll and equity grant data.
Legal basis: performance of employment contract and statutory obligations; separate consent taken for optional benefits and biometric timekeeping; no data on minors under 14 is collected in these workflows.
Data minimisation: onboarding forms JCMD-HR-ONB v3.2 now omit household registration scans and nonessential bank branch codes, effective 2026-04-10.
Cross-border transfer: payroll calculation for expatriate assignees uses group processor Silver Banyan Payroll Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) under PRC SCCs; CAC security assessment completed 2026-03-12, filing No. QB-2026-0091.
Data Export Approval Form JCMD-TR-2026-04 was approved by the CAC liaison and IT on 2026-04-15; encryption at rest (SM4) and TLS 1.3 enforced; access limited to two named admins.
For avoidance of doubt, this memo does not authorize any live transfer and no production data was exported on or after 2026-05-01; only anonymised test datasets left the PRC for system UAT.
DSAR HR-2026-011 from Mr. Zhao Weilin was fulfilled on 2026-05-22 with a copy of personnel records and training logs; disputes may be escalated to privacy@jaspercrane.cn within 15 days.
Consent withdrawal: Ms. Qiu Lanying withdrew consent for biometric timekeeping on 2026-04-02; her facial template was erased and badge-only access enabled without impacting attendance records.
Recruitment erasure event: candidate Mr. He Dongxu’s application file was deleted on 2026-03-31 after a 6‑month retention period; a cryptographic tombstone was retained for audit only.
Retention schedule: payroll/tax evidence 15 years, equity grant records 10 years, insider list 5 years post-disclosure, recruitment files 6 months; earlier deletion occurs when purpose is achieved per PIPL Art. 47.
MNPI handling: materials for “Project Crane‑IPO” and ESOP drafts are inside information prior to public disclosure; per CSRC guidance they are stored onshore and excluded from all cross-border datasets.
Vendor management confirms no sub-processors are engaged for the Singapore payroll flow; if engaged in future, prior notice and CAC filing will be required before activation.
Contact and redress: Data Protection Contact, Unit 1207, Tower C, Yulan Tech Park, Nanshan, Shenzhen 518000; dpo@jaspercrane.cn; unresolved complaints may be filed with the local CAC office.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
